vllm.title: Install `flash_attn` in Docker image
vllm.author: tdoublep
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Recent fix #3269 removed flash_attn as an explicit dependency since it was breaking builds in a bunch of environments and made the wheel size larger.
This PR leaves the wheel unchanged, but installs flash_attn independently within the Docker build (for both the test as well as the runtime image). Th

vllm.title: Add args for mTLS support
vllm.author: declark1
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR exposes additional uvicorn TLS args ssl_ca_certs, ssl_cert_reqs to enable mTLS support.

vllm.title: Fix assertion failure in Qwen 1.5 with prefix caching enabled
vllm.author: chenxu2048
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fix #3355.
Prefix caching is currently not supported with sliding window attention, and model runner asserts model_config.get_sliding_window() is None.
However, Qwen2/Qwen1.5 use use_sliding_window to turn off sliding window, which disables sliding window by default but model_config.get_sliding_wind

vllm.title: [Misc] add HOST_IP env var
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt: if the host has multiple IPs (say one for subnet and one for public IP), and the user want to use a specific one (say the subnet IP), i.e. in distributed clusters, we have to let users specify which IP to use.

vllm.title: Add chat templates for Falcon
vllm.author: Dinghow
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The chat format of Falcon 7B/40B is different from that of Falcon 180B, thus I add two templates.
Falcon 7B official chat format
Falcon 40B official chat format
Falcon 180B official chat API
